title: Lennox International Inc.'s (LII) Alok Maskara on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Lennox International Inc. (NYSE:LII ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 9:30 AM ET Company Participants Steve Harrison - Vice President, Investor Relations Alok Maskara - Chief Executive Officer Joe Reitmeier - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Julian Mitchell - Barclays Jeff Hammond - KeyBanc Gautam Khanna - Cowen Jeff Sprague - Vertical Research Ryan Merkel - William Blair Josh Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Steve Tusa - J.P. Morgan Joe Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Brett Linzey - Mizuho John Walsh - Credit Suisse Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by.

title: Lennox International: The Stock Could Be A Buy Below $200
text: Lennox International is one of the companies that can benefit from the pursuit of energy efficiency of heating and cooling of buildings. The stock looks historically undervalued. However, due to the cyclical nature of the industry, a higher safety margin would be required for a buy recommendation.

title: 3 Construction Stocks Set to Carve a Beat This Earnings Season
text: KBR, LII and EXP from the Zacks Construction sector are set to beat analysts' Q2 expectations on the back of higher residential, non-residential and infrastructural demand amid rising costs.

title: Lennox International Schedules Second Quarter Conference Call
text: DALLAS , July 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Lennox International Inc. (NYSE: LII), a global leader in energy-efficient climate-control solutions, today announced plans to report second quarter 2022 financial results before the market opens on Thursday, July 28, 2022. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m.
